completedItems: Implemented teacher voice intents for morning check, diet, class diet bulk, growth, parent reply, communication navigation, health material navigation, health material task creation, high-risk consultation creation, today task query, dispatch status update, child profile navigation, class/child status query, and pending parent-message query.
All teacher write intents require E06 confirmation before execution.
Teacher voice execution uses E06 command bus and E01 AppDataService only.
Demo seed now includes Lin Xiaoming/c-4, parent visibility for u-parent, and two Chenxi class children.
Voice writes refresh API-backed app state through /api/state and router.refresh().
Cross-class teacher access is blocked by command permission and E01 scope checks.
E08 targeted Playwright passed and screenshots were saved.
remainingItems: Full feature:smoke still has old D08/localStorage communication failures and later dev-server ECONNREFUSED.
Full product:voice parser passed, but Playwright failed in E07 director suite with dev-server ECONNRESET/brain proxy fallback before completing all product voice suites.
A dedicated ambiguous same-name child picker UI is not yet productized beyond current missing-param/permission handling.

checks.featureSmoke: failed: npm run feature:smoke failed first on old D08 communication/localStorage assertions, then dev server dropped and later tests returned ECONNREFUSED
checks.productVoice: partial/failed: npm run product:voice parser 13/13 passed; Playwright failed in E07 director suite with ECONNRESET/brain proxy fallback before all suites completed. E08 targeted Playwright passed separately.

risks: Full product voice suite depends on E07/E09 suites and local brain proxy fallback stability, which failed outside the E08 targeted flow.
Full feature smoke still contains older D08 localStorage-oriented assertions that conflict with API-backed demo state.
Ambiguous child selection UI should be hardened if duplicate nicknames/guardian labels are introduced in production data.
notes: E08 teacher voice functionality is implemented and targeted E08 API/UI/mobile Playwright passed. Overall status is partial only because required broad smoke/product suites did not fully pass for non-E08 reasons.
